title: Creative Brief Templates

posts.author: Ben.felt (Benjamin)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello everyone, I am using the creative Brief colums so when our quarter comes to an end and everyone is making new Objectives and KRs they can explain why they believe the KR is important. I need to be able make the brief, a template so everyone time a new element/item is added the creative brief will already have the desired template. Does anyone know how to acomplish this?

posts.author: RaymondChin (Raymond Chin)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can edit the template for a docs column by going through the header.
More information on Monday Docs
